title: gelasia lasiocarpa
intro: Gelasia lasiocarpa, also known as the glandular gelasia, is a plant species native to North America, belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Gelasia lasiocarpa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Gelasia lasiocarpa can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
